parameters.jsCode: const body=$json.body || $json; const d=body.data || body; const now=new Date().toISOString(); const row={id:body.id || crypto.randomUUID(),created_at:now,uploaded_by:body.uploaded_by || 'web',document_type:d.document_type || body.document_type || 'receipt',expense_category:d.expense_category || body.expense_category || '',issuer_name:d.issuer_name||'',issuer_tax_id:d.issuer_tax_id||'',receipt_no:d.receipt_no||'',issue_date:d.issue_date||'',issue_time:d.issue_time||'',customer_name:d.customer_name||'',customer_tax_id:d.customer_tax_id||'',subtotal_amount:d.subtotal_amount||'',vat_amount:d.vat_amount||'',total_amount:d.total_amount||d.transfer_amount||'',payment_method:d.payment_method||'',bank_name:d.bank_name||'',sender_name:d.sender_name||'',sender_account:d.sender_account||'',receiver_name:d.receiver_name||'',receiver_account:d.receiver_account||'',transfer_datetime:d.transfer_datetime||'',transaction_ref:d.transaction_ref||'',transfer_amount:d.transfer_amount||d.total_amount||'',file_url:body.file_url||'',ocr_text:body.ocr_text||'',status:body.status || 'confirmed'}; return [{json:row}];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, message: 'บันทึกลง Google Sheets สำเร็จ', row: $json } }}
